$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; parent swapped to artisanpack/buttons. Attributes/supports/styles/selectors verbatim.

Simplified port. Upstream pulls in unlock(blockEditorPrivateApis) for HTMLElementControl, a Popover-anchored LinkControl, a useEnter ENTER-splitter that calls replaceBlocks on the parent block, a dimensions-preset width resolver, and useSettings for fluid typography. The fork uses a plain SelectControl for tagName, a window.prompt-based ToolbarButton for the URL, a TextControl for rel, and applies width via getWidthClasses without resolving presets. The createPageEntity / LinkControl suggestion flow is dropped.
TypeScript port; adds explicit 'wp-block-button' wrapper class for renderer parity. Falls back to a dangerouslySetInnerHTML <a> when RichText.Content is unavailable (test environments).

SIMPLIFIED — upstream ships a 12-entry, ~1750-LOC deprecation chain spanning every save-output change since 2017. The fork ports only the legacy width (1-4 → percentage) migration and the v1 customBackgroundColor/customTextColor → style.color migration. Older deprecations are not carried; documents shaped to them need a CLI migration before they load.
Adds bidirectional block transforms for core/button ↔ artisanpack/button so mixed documents round-trip during the V2 rollout. Upstream owns multi-block button grouping in the parent buttons block.
TypeScript port of getWidthClasses + isPercentageWidth; behavior unchanged.

Combined SCSS-to-CSS port. $blocks-block__margin inlined as 0.5em via the --wp--style--block-gap fallback. data-type selectors rewritten. The @use of @wordpress/base-styles colors is replaced with a hardcoded #fff focus shadow.
Inline pill SVG for the inserter.
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract. Upstream's PHP-side init wiring is not carried.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx replaces upstream's LinkControl + Popover anchor + onEnter splitter with a plain window.prompt URL toolbar button. The page-creation flow (createPageEntity / withCreateSuggestion) is dropped — links are URLs only, no inline page creation.
edit.tsx drops the dimension-preset width resolver (var:preset|dimension|<slug> → preset size lookup). Preset widths render as CSS variables in the canvas instead.
edit.tsx drops useDeprecatedTextAlign — the fork doesn't need the legacy text-align attribute migration in the editor.

deprecated.tsx drops 10 of upstream's 12 deprecation entries. Documents containing button blocks saved before the v1 customColor → style.color migration (i.e. very old WP 5.x exports) won't load and must be migrated via a one-shot CLI script.
transforms.ts is fork-only (upstream button has no transforms.js). Required for V2 coexistence with core/button.
block.json parent swapped to artisanpack/buttons — the child only inserts under the forked parent.
